[cron:ac6a2f54-25b0-490e-a749-bc0347f3a8eb pre-digest-healthcheck] Run system health check before morning digest: verify gateway up, telegram channels healthy, maxwell sweep freshness, and report failures to Louis via Telegram.
Current time: Saturday, April 11th, 2026 - 6:50 AM (America/New_York) / 2026-04-11 10:50 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Service file: ~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.gateway.plist
